title: Inheritance, MRO, Super, and Mixins
description: Evaluate extension designs for physical, digital, and restricted library resources. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of an extensible resource type hierarchy while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use inheritance only for substitutable is-a behavior.
Predict method resolution and cooperative super calls in multiple inheritance.
Choose composition when variation does not belong in one hierarchy.
